ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state record was last updated */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square mile) */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "senators" TEXT /* Names of the current senators */,
  "representatives" TEXT /* Names of the current representatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_environment_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the ranking is for */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the state */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the ranking was calculated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking methodology or criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ranking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ranking was last updated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used for ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_environment_rankings_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the poverty rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the poverty rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Poverty rate as a percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the poverty rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the poverty rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the poverty rate entry was last updated */,
  "population_estimated" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the given year */,
  "poverty_threshold" REAL /* Poverty threshold used for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_school_graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the graduation rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the graduation rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate as a percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the graduation rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the graduation rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the graduation rate entry was last updated */,
  "number_of_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_school_graduation_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_school_graduation_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_household_incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the income is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the income was recorded */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median household income in dollars */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the income data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the income entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the income entry was last updated */,
  "income_change" REAL /* Change in median household income compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_household_incomes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_household_incomes_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insurance_rates" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the insurance rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the insurance rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of lack of health insurance as a percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the insurance rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the insurance rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the insurance rate entry was last updated */,
  "number_of_uninsured" INTEGER /* Number of people without health insurance */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_insurance_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_insurance_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_rates" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the unemployment rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the unemployment rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the unemployment rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unemployment rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unemployment rate entry was last updated */,
  "number_of_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed people */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Total labor force for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "violent_crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the crime rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the crime rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate per 100,000 people */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime rate entry was last updated */,
  "number_of_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes reported */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violent_crime_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violent_crime_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_rates" (
  "mental_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the mental health rate is for */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the mental health rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of poor mental health as a percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the mental health rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mental health rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mental health rate entry was last updated */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases of poor mental health */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_rates_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source record was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Rating of the data quality provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
